title: Prism's Red Glowstone
description: Transforming the glowstones color from yellow / gold to fancy red to match the nether
body:
![Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0aec3e8284c9dac87acb3428b38046fd6dc67fb.png)
## INFORMATION

**This Recourse pack retextures _glowstone_ into a _bold red variant_ giving it a _darker_ and more intence look while keeping the original texture style. the new color make lighting feel more atmospheric, perfect for nether builds, dark themes or unique base designs. it keeps the same brightness and functionality.**
